chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 536 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 03-11-2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with Abdul Majeed Chachar, XEN Roads Ghotki on behalf of Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki and Zulfiqar Ali, Admn: Manager JDW Sugar Mills >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. The instant Petition is pending since, 2023 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
